documents.title: Leave Policy
documents.content: Full-time employees receive 21 paid leave days per calendar year. Leave requests must be submitted in the HR portal at least five working days before the first day of leave. The reporting manager approves the request.

documents.title: Security Incident Policy
documents.content: Suspected phishing must be reported to security@acme.test within 15 minutes. Employees must never share passwords or one-time passwords. A lost company device must be reported immediately to the security team.

documents.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
documents.content: Business expenses up to INR 5,000 do not require advance approval. Any expense above INR 5,000 requires the employee's reporting manager to approve it before purchase. Receipts must be uploaded within 10 calendar days.

documents.title: Engineering Release Calendar
documents.content: Production releases are scheduled on Tuesday and Thursday at 4 PM IST. Friday is a production freeze day. Emergency releases require approval from the incident commander and engineering director.

documents.title: New Joiner Onboarding Guide
documents.content: New joiners receive their laptop on day one and are assigned a buddy for the first 30 days. Mandatory security training must be completed within seven calendar days. Payroll documents are submitted in the HR portal.

documents.title: Customer Support SLA
documents.content: Priority 1 incidents require acknowledgement within 15 minutes, customer updates every 30 minutes, and a target service restoration time of four hours. Priority 2 incidents require acknowledgement within two hours.

documents.title: Project Orion Runbook
documents.content: Project Orion runs Python 3.12 with FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Production alerts are handled in the #eng-oncall channel. The primary deployment region is Singapore.

documents.title: Sales Discount Rules
documents.content: Account executives may approve discounts up to 10 percent. Discounts above 10 percent require approval from the VP of Sales. All discounts must be recorded in the CRM.

documents.title: People Team Interview Process
documents.content: Interviewers must submit the structured scorecard within 24 hours of an interview. The hiring manager owns the final recommendation. Candidate feedback must not be posted in public Slack channels.

documents.title: Alice Travel Preferences
documents.content: Alice prefers an aisle seat and vegetarian meals for business travel. Her preferred departure airport is Hyderabad.

documents.title: Bob Private Project Notes
documents.content: Bob's private launch codename is Cedar. His internal rehearsal is scheduled for Wednesday at 3 PM IST.
